evidence.note: Only one gender reroll is needed; extra rerolls reset progress.
Zombification targets match the post-reroll gender.
57 was called too much, so the count is below that.
Targets do not have to be unique.
Zombie passive Blood Bar is involved in the zombifying step.
Manual grip is the clean zombification method.
Return/die/invade commands are not needed for the clean route.
No Volt/mode lock is part of the clean route.
Converted zombies do not need to act.
The two tail tasks are same for everyone but order can differ.
SideCharacter gave the order as reroll -> zombify -> ??? -> ???.
Image solution says BC uses the char rule.
Image solution says xy uses the mirror rule.
Image solution says bc uses the gender rule.
Screenshot shows one player copied another player's appearance.

count_distribution.reason: literal 50-ish and clean upper candidate below 57
just under 50 if exact 50 was rounded upward
lower fallback if logs/counting are noisy

tail_candidates.label: Copy/mirror appearance, then same-gender final zombify
tasks: copy or mirror another player's character appearance after the count
zombify/grip a same-gender target while that copied/mirrored relation is active
tail_candidates.caution: Best fit, but exact direction is still unknown: actor copies target, target copies actor, or B/C copy each other.

tail_candidates.label: B/C same-gender character mirror pair
tasks: make the relevant B/C players same gender after the one reroll route
make their character appearance mirror/copy relation match before the final check
tail_candidates.caution: Strong decode fit. It may be a state check rather than an extra kill/count check.

tail_candidates.label: Copy appearance before count and keep it active
tasks: copy/mirror appearance before starting the same-gender count
keep the relation active through the x50-ish zombification loop
tail_candidates.caution: Very plausible mechanically, but it slightly fights the stated order of zombify -> ??? -> ???.

tail_candidates.label: Appearance copy as the whole tail
tasks: copy another player's character appearance
talk/check NPC without items/accessory matching
tail_candidates.caution: Explains the screenshot, but underuses the same-gender zombification hint.

tail_candidates.label: Passive Blood Bar and manual grip are the two tail counters
tasks: fill same-gender targets with passive Blood Bar
manual-grip those same-gender targets into zombies
tail_candidates.caution: Could be part of the zombifying phase rather than the two decoded tail tasks.

tail_candidates.label: The x50-ish same-gender count is all visible work
tasks: complete the true same-gender zombification amount
perform the NPC/progress check after the amount
tail_candidates.caution: Good baseline, but it does not explain the new image solution.

tail_candidates.label: Base Zombie T/G move counters
tasks: use Splatter/T on same-gender targets
use Self Infliction/G on same-gender targets
tail_candidates.caution: Fallback only; current hints point to char/mirror/gender, not move names.

tail_candidates.label: Base Zombie X/C move counters
tasks: use Dancing Dead Boys/X on same-gender targets
use Blood Drive/C on same-gender targets
tail_candidates.caution: Lower fallback than T/G because no current hint points at X/C specifically.

tail_candidates.label: Item/accessory cosplay match
tasks: match visible accessories/items
talk/check NPC after cosmetic matching
tail_candidates.caution: Explicitly downgraded because items/accessories are not needed.

tail_candidates.label: Return/die command route
tasks: use return command after zombifying
use die command after zombifying

tail_candidates.label: Old repeated-reroll A/B/C route
tasks: reroll between gender path blocks
repeat the old A/B/C or 2x2 matrix
tail_candidates.caution: Reset-risk route. Do not test first.

steps: Zombify same-gender targets with passive Blood Bar -> knock -> manual grip.
Check milestones at 40, 45, 49, and 50; top count is 50.
For the two tail tasks, first test appearance copy/mirror plus same-gender final zombify.
